subject: fix(pwa): sync meta theme-color with DaisyUI combo system
body:
The <meta name="theme-color"> tags were still hardcoded to the old
brand color #10b981 from before the DaisyUI migration. The default
combo is "classic" which uses #808080 (light) and #000000 (dark).

This caused the PWA status bar to flash the wrong color between HTML
parse and Vue mount, since only the composable updated it dynamically.

Changes:
- index.html meta tags: #10b981 → #808080 (light) / #000000 (dark)
- Flash prevention script: now also sets meta theme-color before
  first paint (reads combo meta colors from hardcoded combos object)
- vite.config.ts manifest theme_color: #10b981 → #808080
- CLAUDE.md sync points: 3 → 4 locations (added manifest theme_color)

Tags: pwa, theme, daisyui, fix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
